useBech32Scheme.description: Whether to use [LUD-01](https://github.com/fiatjaf/lnurl-rfc/blob/luds/01.md)'s bech32 format or to use [LUD-17](https://github.com/fiatjaf/lnurl-rfc/blob/luds/17.md) url formatting.

lud12Enabled.description: Allow comments to be passed on via lnurl.

lud21Enabled.description: Whether to include a [LUD-21](https://github.com/lnurl/luds/blob/luds/21.md) verify URL in LNURL-pay callback responses, enabling external services to verify payment settlement without authentication.
